entries.source: When I first took a C course, I couldn't understand a single thing explained in class. Thank God I got a friend of mine who's a programmer to explain to me how the whole caboodle works.

entries.source: He's not beaten by the rain; he's not beaten by the wind; neither the snow nor the heat of the summer will beat him; his body is robust, without greed; he never angers, but is always serenely smiling.
entries.reference: 비에도 지지 않고, 바람에도 지지 않고, 눈에도 여름의 더위에도 지지 않는 튼튼한 몸을 가지고 결코 화내지 않으면서 언제나 조용히 웃고 있다.
